overall.description: A stationary camera captures a wet cyberpunk city street at night in a video game environment (Cyberpunk 2077). Neon-lit futuristic buildings line the multi-lane road as various vehicles drive past, with a notable traffic incident where a red sports car stops in the middle of the road causing other vehicles to navigate around it.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic multi-lane city street with neon signage and wet pavement

events.description: first black sedan enters frame from the distance driving toward the camera
black sedan passes the camera followed by a second dark vehicle

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of street traffic from the sidewalk position

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving down the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: long horizontal fluorescent light fixture spanning across the street
tall digital screen displaying purple and pink neon advertisement with female figure
tall futuristic building with illuminated windows and industrial details
tall building with multiple glowing billboards and neon accents
low concrete wall separating the sidewalk from the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an empty wet cyberpunk street at night, illuminated by overhead neon lights and building signage. A black sedan soon enters from the distance, driving toward the stationary camera and passing by, its headlights reflecting off the rain-slicked asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with stopped traffic forming a small backup

events.description: red sports car enters and stops abruptly in the middle of the road
black SUV stops behind the red car, creating a two-vehicle backup

agents.ego_description: watching the traffic incident unfold as the red car remains stopped in the lane

notable_agents.action: red sports car stopped stationary in the middle of the road with brake lights on
black SUV approaching and stopping behind the red sports car

segments.scene_description: A red sports car enters the frame and stops abruptly in the middle lane, causing a traffic disruption. A black SUV accumulates behind it, creating a small backup while both vehicles remain stationary under the glow of the overhead neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with traffic navigating around an obstacle

events.description: purple sedan carefully maneuvers around the stopped red car on the left side
red sports car finally drives off and exits the frame to the right

agents.ego_description: observing traffic flow resume as vehicles navigate around the stopped car and continue down the street

notable_agents.action: purple sedan passing the stopped red car and continuing down the road

segments.scene_description: Traffic resumes flowing as a purple sedan carefully navigates around the stopped red car, followed by a green car and other vehicles. The red sports car eventually drives off and exits the frame, allowing normal traffic flow to resume on the neon-lit street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary view of a rain-slicked cyberpunk street that shifts from a quiet night scene to a moment of traffic congestion before returning to a steady flow. It begins on an empty, neon-illuminated road where a black sedan emerges from the distance and glides past the camera, its headlights shimmering on the wet asphalt. As the scene progresses, a red sports car enters the frame and stops abruptly in the middle lane, causing a black SUV to pull up behind it and create a temporary standstill under the glow of the city signage. The tension then eases as a purple sedan and a green car carefully navigate around the obstruction, gradually restoring the rhythm of the street. Finally, the red sports car drives away and exits the frame, allowing the normal stream of futuristic traffic to resume its path through the glowing cityscape.
